REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1 Mccormick St., San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Aug-28-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Ernest Der appearing for JFCS. Jill Rudee is in court. Sale is confirmed at $900,000.00j. Additional bond in the amount of $896,000.00 is required. Order signed.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

FILING OF INVENTORY
Off Calendar Jul-31-2007 Off Calendar

FILING OF INVENTORY
Off Calendar Jul-10-2007 Continued To Jul-31-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

FILING OF INVENTORY
Off Calendar Jun-05-2007 Continued To Jul-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Authority To Sell Real Property And For Authority To Enter Into Exclusive Right-To-Sell Agreement
Off Calendar May-14-2007 Granted Per Written Order

Petn. To Appt. Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Feb-22-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der (Counsel for the Temporary Conservator, Jewish Family and Children's Services ("JFCS")); Jill Rudee (JFCS).

After noting that the Trustor (Gene Lagergren) passed away and questioning when distribution will occur, the Court granted the Petition Appointing JFCS the Successor Trustee of the Gene Lagergren Revocable Trust and Bringing the Trust under Court Supervision (signing the Order for same in open court).

Further Orders:
Inventory with Proof of Mailing (or Order Dispensing with Mailing) and Notice of how to file objections must be filed two weeks before: June 5, 2007.
First Accounting must be filed two weeks before: May 5, 2008.
Bond is set at $130,000.00.

Judicial Officer: Commissioner Dorothy L. McMath; Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR# 7782; Court Investigator: Jeanine Lim; Bailiff: J. Peralta; Clerk: C. Joy Guandique.

Petn. To Appt. Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-25-2007 Continued To Feb-22-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
